reasoning: Most credible Apple insiders and supply chain analysts (like Ming-Chi Kuo and Mark Gurman) consistently report that the Apple Vision Pro 2 has been delayed to late 2026 or 2027. While Apple may release a cheaper 'Apple Vision' headset in late 2025, the criteria specifically require the product to be recognized as a SUCCESSOR to the Vision Pro, expanding on its original functions. Cheaper models stripped of features (like EyeSight or high-end processors) would not meet the requirement of expanding on its functions. The earliest rumors of a true successor point to an M5-powered Vision Pro in late 2025 or 2026, but recent reporting strongly favors 2026, and manufacturing timelines typically preclude a late-2025 launch for the high-end model. Therefore, the chance of 'Apple Vision Pro 2' releasing before Dec 31, 2025, is quite low.
